name: ground_truth_ia2_mfa_privileged_compliant
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 159, CCI-000767, assessed 2026-05-29). Compliant verdict based on SDA Enterprise Services Controls mapping and SSH PKE certificate-based MFA. Narrative uses 'Reviewed' and 'Confirmed' affirming phrases. Evidence type: enterprise controls overlay + technical implementation (SSH PKE, smart card/HSM). Tests narrative acceptance with overlay-derived evidence and specific authentication technology references.

ccis_row.guidance: 000767: The information system implements multifactor authentication for local access to privileged accounts.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment examines the information system to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed configures the information system to implement multifactor authentication for local access to privileged accounts.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- SDA Enterprise Services Controls (SDA Controls tab, IA-2(3) Req #550) — requirement for multifactor authentication for local privileged access.
- SSH PKE configuration export — certificate-based authentication settings for privileged local access (cryptographic identity stored on hardware token, unlocked with PIN).

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Examined SDA Enterprise Services Controls (IA-2(3) Req #550): ground system shall use multifactor authentication for local access to privileged accounts. Confirmed via SSH PKE configuration that local privileged access uses certificate-based authentication (cryptographic identity stored on hardware token, unlocked with PIN), satisfying multifactor authentication.
